data.title: CN Declares Third-Quarter 2026 Dividend
data.description: Montreal-based CN (CNR, CNI) declared a third-quarter 2026 dividend for its common shares. Each shareholder as of September 8, 2026, will receive C$0.9150 per share on September 29, 2026. This decision was made by the Board of Directors.

data.title: Canopy Growth to Report First Quarter Fiscal 2027 Financial Results on August 7, 2026
data.description: Smiths Falls, Ontario-based Canopy Growth Corporation is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter of 2027 on August 7. The announcement will be accompanied by a conference call scheduled for 10:00am Eastern Time. Stakeholders and investors are eagerly awaiting the report to gain insights into the company's performance during this period.

data.title: NextEra Energy second-quarter 2026 financial results available on company's website
data.description: In a news release on July 24, 2026, NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NEE) announced its second-quarter financial results. The information can be accessed on the company's website at www.NextEraEnergy.com/FinancialResults. The management team of the company will also be discussing these results.

data.title: Lufax Announces Board and Management Changes
data.description: On July 24, 2026, in Shanghai, Lufax Holding Ltd, a prominent financial services facilitator for small business operators in China, divulged alterations within its board of directors and senior management. These changes will come into effect on July 25, 2026. Lufax, listed on NYSE as LU and HKEX as 6623, is a significant player in the Chinese financial sector.

data.title: ChoiceOne Reports Second Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Sparta, Michigan, on July 24, 2026, ChoiceOne Financial Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: COFS), the holding company of ChoiceOne Bank, released their financial report for the quarter ending on June 30, 2026. Notable figures include a net income of $12.5 million, equivalent to $0.83 per share.

data.title: New 12-Week Coaching Program by Torchlight Vitality Offers Women a Practical, Step-by-Step Path to Managing Fibromyalgia Symptoms
data.description: Linda Fraas, a Certified Fibromyalgia Health Management Specialist who has over three decades of experience living with fibromyalgia, has introduced Fibromyalgia Freedom: Reclaim Your Life. This 12-week online coaching program is designed to assist women in reclaiming their lives from the condition.

data.title: Dott announces withdrawal of Written Procedure and the launch of a new Written Procedure under its Senior Secured Floating Rate Bonds 2025/2029
data.description: On July 24, 2026 in Amsterdam, TIER Mobility SE, also known as Dott, released information about commencing a Written Procedure on July 17, 2026. This procedure is related to their senior secured floating rate of up to EUR 150,000,000.

data.title: AGF Investments Announces July 2026 Cash Distributions for AGF Enhanced U.S. Equity Income Fund, AGF Enhanced U.S. Income Plus Fund, AGF Total Return Bond Fund and AGF Systematic Global Infrastructure ETF
data.description: Today, AGF Investments Inc. declared the July 2026 cash distributions for certain funds. Unitholders recorded on July 31, 2026, will receive distributions on August 7, 2026. The funds include AGF Enhanced U.S. Equity Income Fund*, AGF Enhanced U.S. Income Plus Fund*, AGF Total Return Bond Fund*, and AGF Systematic Global Infrastructure ETF. The specific distribution amounts per unit were also disclosed.

data.title: CN Delivers on Commitments with Strong Second Quarter Results and Raises 2026 Guidance
data.description: On July 24, 2026, CN (CNR) (CNI) released its financial and operating results for the quarter ending June 30, 2026, based in Montreal.

data.title: Zevra Therapeutics updates on submission for Arimoclomol for Niemann-Pick Disease Type C in the EU. #NPC #regulatory #EU
data.description: In the latest development, the government has announced a new economic stimulus package worth $900 billion to combat the financial impacts of the ongoing pandemic. This relief bill includes direct payments of $600 to qualifying individuals and an additional $600 per dependent child. The package also provides $300 a week in enhanced unemployment benefits and funding for small business loans. Furthermore, $25 billion will be allocated for rental assistance and an extension of the eviction moratorium. This new legislation comes as the unemployment rate remains high at 6.7% and as many struggle to make ends meet during these challenging times.

data.title: Postal Realty Trust, Inc. to Report Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on August 4, 2026
data.description: CEDARHURST, N.Y.- On July 24, 2026, Postal Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: PSTL) disclosed plans to release its financial outcomes for the period concluding on June 30, 2026. The real estate investment trust, managing 2,300+ properties leased majorly to the United States Postal Service, from small post offices to industrial sites, will make the announcement post market closure on Tuesday, August 4, 2026.
